title: rubus × amictiformis
intro: Rubus × amictiformis, also known as the hybrid raspberry or raspberry hybrid, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties due to its high content of anthocyanins and ellagic acid. The health benefits of Rubus × amictiformis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or jam, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, such as digestive issues and skin problems.
